title: Duel on Bastion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Duel |prev=[[Assassination on Munto Codru]][[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] |conc= |next=[[Dauntless crew killing|''Dauntless'' crew killing]] |image=[[File:Roan_Fel_vs_Darth_Kruhl2.jpg]] |name=Duel on Bastion |conflict=[[Second Imperial Civil War]] |date=[[137 ABY]] |place=[[Pellaeon Gardens]], [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] |result=Death of [[Darth Kruhl]] and entire crew of the [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']] |side1=[[Imperial Knight]]s |side2=[[One Sith]] |side3= |side4= |forces1=[[Roan Fel]] |forces2=Darth Kruhl† |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2=*Darth Kruhl *Entire crew of the ''Dauntless'', including Captain [[Dorn (captain)|Dorn]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I've been expecting you. Well, someone like you. It's what I would have done.|Roan Fel, to Darth Kruhl|}} The '''Duel on Bastion''' was a short confrontation between the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] of the [[Fel Empire]] and the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Kruhl]], who had been dispatched by [[Darth Maladi]] to assassinate Fel. The duel ended with the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Kruhl, who was unexpectedly shot by the holdout [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] of Roan Fel. ==Background== {{Quote|The first priority is the death of Roan Fel. ''[…]'' Success is more important than survival. But your survival depends on your success.|Darth Maladi to Vikar Dorn|}} [[Darth Maladi]] had recently learned that [[Roan Fel]], the deposed ruler of the Fel Dynasty, had retaken the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] and retook the throne. Maladi knew that a frontal assault on the heavily fortified planet would not only stretch the entire Imperial-loyal Sith fleet thin, she also that some of the fleet might defect if they learned that it was former Emperor Fel they would be attacking. However, Fel's [[Second Imperial Civil War|resistance]] depended on his survival. With all this in mind, Maladi dispatched her [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Darth Kruhl]] to Bastion with the covert mission of ending the life of Roan Fel. Lady Maladi devised a plan to allow [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Kruhl to infiltrate Bastion by using the defection of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Vikar Dorn]] and the entire crew of the [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']] as bait. ==The duel== {{Quote|I'm prepared to die.''"
"''Good. I'm prepared to kill you.|Darth Kruhl and Roan Fel|}} With Dorn allowed to land, Darth Kruhl infiltrated the [[Pellaeon Gardens]] where Emperor Fel was meditating. Kruhl, believing he had the element of surprise, was caught off guard by Fel, who had sensed his presence via [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and was quick to react with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. When Kruhl tried to slash Fel with his own blade, it struck the Emperor's [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] gauntlet, shorting out Kruhl's lightsaber on contact. Kruhl then unleashed a barrage of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]] against Fel, who was able to absorb it with his lightsaber. Kruhl finally used [[Telekinesis/Legends|Telekinesis]] against Fel, slamming the trees of the garden into him. The duel then became a fist fight, but Fel soon unfurled a holdout [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and shot Kruhl, killing him. Before the Sith Lord's death, Fel demanded that Kruhl surrender, even if he succeeded in killing him, he would not leave Bastion alive. [[Antares Draco]] rushed into the gardens, having sensed Kruhl as well. Fel told Draco he was all right, and ordered him to bring him Governor Dorn. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Be careful Maladi, that you do not scheme for scheming's sake. Do not become so enamored of your plotting that you lose sight of your goal…the death of Roan Fel.|[[Darth Krayt]]|}} [[File:MaladiKillsDorn-Leg13.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Vikar Dorn is killed by [[Darth Maladi]].]] Following the duel and the death of Lord Kruhl, Emperor Fel had Vikar Dorn order the ''Dauntless'' crew to debark for "debriefing". However, when the crew was gathered, Fel ordered their [[Dauntless crew killing|execution]], with only Dorn being spared. He was then dropped in a [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] close to [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial Sith-loyal]] ships, taking Kruhl's lightsaber with him. Dorn was taken to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], having revealed nothing of the assassination plot. He was executed by Lady Maladi, however, after he revealed to her the course of events that culminated with the death of Lord Kruhl. While Emperor [[Darth Krayt]] chided Maladi for her failure, she revealed to Krayt that she was confident a new chance to assassinate Fel would come, this time from within his own ranks. However, Krayt reprimanded her, reminding Maladi not to lose sight of both her goal and his will. Darth Maladi's statement would eventually proved true a year later when Fel was killed by one of his own Imperial Knights, Draco himself, to prevent him from launching [[Omega Red]] he acquired from her after he fell into the dark side.[[Legacy — War 6|''Legacy — War'' 6]] ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]] {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I||''Dauntless'' (2)," "Dorn, Vikar," "Fel, Roan}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SecondImperialCivilWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Duelo en Bastion |fi=Miekkailu Bastionilla }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bastion, Duel on}} [[Category:Battles of Bastion]] [[Category:Battles of the Second Imperial Civil War]] [[Category:Duels]]
